name: Control Environment
description: Establish governance and accountability practices that support reliable control execution.

name: Communication and Information
description: Maintain communication and information practices that support control awareness and operation.

name: Risk Assessment
description: Assess and prioritize risks that could affect service commitments and system requirements.

name: Logical and Physical Access Controls
description: Apply access controls to protect systems, data, and supporting infrastructure.

name: System Operations
description: Monitor systems and respond to events so service commitments remain reliable.

name: Risk Mitigation
description: Mitigate operational and third-party risks through defined control activities.
